text: Ever thought gravity could bend light? Massive objects like galaxies warp spacetime, creating a phenomenon called gravitational lensing. This bending makes background galaxies look distorted or even multiplied! Einstein predicted this effect over a century ago, and we've seen it confirmed in observations. So, next time you look at the stars, remember: gravity isn’t just pulling, it’s shaping reality. Curious for more cosmic wonders? Hit that follow button!
